value.found_quote: `CLAUDE.md` memory files    | `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` for the user tier and the session's working directory for the project tier
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes CLAUDE.md memory files as a type of agent state that lives on the container's filesystem, with two tiers: a user-level file at `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` and a project-level file in the session's working directory. The page also discusses how these files persist information and need separate storage strategies (mounted volume or object-store sync) to survive container restarts, confirming their role in persisting information across sessions. The page additionally references "Auto memory" at `~/.claude/projects/<session>/memory/` that loads into the system prompt, further confirming per-user and per-project memory file functionality.
